indexName: Nifty AAA Bond Plus SDL Apr 2026 50:50 Index

holdings.name: Axis AAA Bond Plus SDL ETF 2026 Maturity
holdings.description: This is itself the ETF basket (CRISIL IBX AAA Bond Plus SDL Index — Jun 2026). Constituent bonds: a mix of AAA-rated PSU bonds (NABARD, NHAI, IRFC, Power Finance Corporation) and State Development Loans (SDL) across major states (Maharashtra, Gujarat, Karnataka, UP), all maturing by June 2026. Yield to maturity ~7.2-7.5%. SEBI's Target Maturity ETF category — investors who hold to maturity know their return upfront.
